text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
That's right, Tarumae, dear. I was meaning to say
thank you for that treat.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I hope you liked it. The daikon was pickled in
haskap!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: It was simply lovely. And such a sweet pink color.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Heh! Isn't it great?! Haskap berries are packed
with color, flavor, and vitamins. They're the best!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I used to go berry picking a lot at the farms in my
hometown. You have to pick them gently, one by
one, since they're so soft.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
They're pretty sour if you eat them raw, but you
can use them in all sorts of cooking, even baking!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Ah! An all-purpose athlete good with everything...
Is that the kind of idol I should try to be?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I-I think I've got it. I'm going to become just like a
haskap—an all-purpose local idol!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Well, you don't say. Hehe, Tarumae, you sure are
a real go-getter.
